name: Playbooks
description: Mattermost Playbooks enable reliable and repeatable processes for your teams using checklists, automation, and retrospectives.

settings.help_text: When true, enable a Microsoft Teams Tab app to expose Mattermost Playbook runs.

settings.display_name: Authorized Tenant IDs for Teams Tab App
settings.help_text: A comma separated list of Microsoft Tenant IDs allowed to access Playbook runs.
Enable experimental features that come with in-progress UI, bugs, and cool stuff.
When enabled, sends incremental WebSocket updates instead of full playbook run objects for better performance.
When true, exposes the PDF report export endpoints for playbook runs and playbooks.
Maximum number of channel posts included in a run report transcript before truncation.
Maximum byte cap for a run report. 0 cascades to the server FileSettings.MaxFileSize, falling back to 5 MB.
Maximum number of report renders in flight at once. Additional callers receive 429 with Retry-After.
Maximum user / channel / file lookups performed while resolving markdown references in a single report.
When true, run report exports include the channel transcript section by default (when the requester is a channel member).
When true, the report download UI surfaces a tip pointing to the Channel Export plugin for full-fidelity CSV exports.
